title: Security: out of bound read in vfd_out_locked
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
There is an out of bound read in vfd_out_locked(drivers/virtio/virtio_wl.c):  
  
```  
static ssize_t vfd_out_locked(struct virtwl_vfd \*vfd, char __user \*buffer,  
			      size_t len)  
{  
		[...]  
		size_t recv_offset = sizeof(\*recv) + recv->vfd_count \*
